title: crotalaria argyrolobioides
intro: Crotalaria argyrolobioides, also known as the silver leaf rattlebox or hairy rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Crotalaria argyrolobioides can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
